description_long: This helmet features a robust, matte black shell with a high-tech, tactical appearance, incorporating multiple angular panels and reinforced sections. The front is equipped with a full-face tinted visor, providing comprehensive facial protection and a sleek, modern look. Integrated on both sides are circular, mechanical components that resemble advanced communication or audio devices. The rear of the helmet is smooth and rounded, with a subtle heart-shaped pink graphic on one side, adding a touch of personalization. The top of the helmet displays textured padding and several attachment points, suggesting modularity for accessories or mounts. Overall, the helmet combines utilitarian design with subtle decorative elements, suitable for urban tactical or motorcycling scenarios.
description: A matte black, high-tech helmet with a full-face visor, angular panels, and side-mounted circular devices, featuring a small pink heart graphic on one side.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full-face tinted visor, angular black panels, and the central forehead section with a textured pad.
description_view_1: Side-top view highlights the circular mechanical component on the ear area, the modular black panels, and the textured top padding.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the smooth, rounded back of the helmet with no visible visor, and both side-mounted circular devices.
description_view_3: Opposite side-top view displays the pink heart graphic, modular black panels, and the circular side device.
attribute_graphic_design: A small pink heart graphic with text on the left side; otherwise, the helmet is solid black with no additional patterns.
